nasb.text: But the prince of the kingdom of Persia was withstanding me for twenty-one days; then behold, Michael, one of the chief princes, came to help me, for I had been left there with the kings of Persia.

esv.text: The prince of the kingdom of Persia withstood me twenty-one days, but Michael, one of the chief princes, came to help me, for I was left there with the kings of Persia,

cnv.text: 但波斯國的護衛天使攔阻我二十一天；後來有護衛天使長中的一位米迦勒來幫助我，我就留他在那裡，和波斯眾王在一起。

ccb.text: 波斯国的守护神拦阻我二十一日。由于我滞留在波斯诸王那里，天使长米迦勒便来帮助我。
